Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ann Reding, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: McCormick and Schmick Restaurant Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCE STATED. HEARING HELD and TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff Scott Smith's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production is denied in part and granted in part.
Interrogatories
32
Denied.
Request for production of documents.
26
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce documents that state the date of any request for family leave, the action in response to the request, and the duration of any leave. Defendant may redact the names of persons other than the affected employee and any medical information.
27
Granted
30
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents for the period of January 1, 2004 to June 8, 2006. Defendant may redact the names and other personal identifying information of the complainants.
31
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents for the period of April 1, 2005 to April 30, 2006. Defendant may redact the names and other personal identifying information of the complainants. Parties stipulated to producing a chart. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
